operational_constraints: Requires signage, triage process, mask supply, and staffing
finding_text: CDC advises screening/triage and respiratory hygiene during periods of increased community influenza activity
codeblue_translation: Route front-end screening and alerting based on external seasonality profile and current status

operational_constraints: Requires supply, access, coverage monitoring, and communication
source_basis: CDC Flu Infection Control 2025; CDC High Risk 2024
finding_text: CDC says annual influenza vaccination is the most important preventive measure and high HCP/patient coverage is critical
codeblue_translation: Route vaccination and coverage review as a standing seasonal prevention program

operational_constraints: Requires mask tolerance and intake workflow
finding_text: CDC recommends screening symptomatic persons, masking, and respiratory hygiene/cough etiquette
codeblue_translation: Route immediate source-control review at first contact

operational_constraints: Needs non-punitive leave policy and staffing backup
finding_text: CDC says ill HCP should not report to work or should stop patient care, mask, notify, and remain excluded until criteria are met
codeblue_translation: Route immediate occupational-health and staffing review when HCP illness is detected

finding_text: CDC says returning HCP with residual cough/sneezing should wear a facemask during patient care and reinforce hand hygiene
codeblue_translation: Keep a staff-source-control layer even after fever ends

operational_constraints: May need extension in special populations
finding_text: CDC recommends Droplet Precautions for 7 days after illness onset or until 24 hours after fever and respiratory symptoms resolve, whichever is longer
codeblue_translation: Use as the default inpatient influenza isolation-duration rule

operational_constraints: Single-room shortages may require cohorting or other IPC-reviewed placement options
source_basis: CDC Flu Infection Control 2025; CDC Isolation Precautions 2023
finding_text: CDC advises a private room or area and recommends infection-control consultation when a single room is not available
codeblue_translation: Route IPC-backed rooming review rather than hard-coded bed placement

operational_constraints: Patient may not tolerate mask in all cases
finding_text: CDC advises masking the patient if possible during transport and communicating precautions before transfer
codeblue_translation: Route transport precautions as a standard leakage-control review

operational_constraints: Local legal and humanitarian exceptions may apply
finding_text: CDC advises limiting in-person visitation while the patient is infectious and counseling on risks
codeblue_translation: Route visitor review during the infectious period

operational_constraints: Emergent cases may limit ideal setup but not the review
finding_text: CDC advises AGPs only when medically necessary, limiting personnel, using N95-equivalent respiratory protection, and applying environmental controls
codeblue_translation: Route enhanced procedure review for AGPs, not ordinary bedside care

operational_constraints: Depends on contraindications, timing, and drug availability
finding_text: CDC says antivirals are an important adjunct to vaccination and oseltamivir is recommended for treatment in hospitalized patients
codeblue_translation: Route human-reviewed antiviral treatment consideration for hospitalized cases

operational_constraints: Depends on contraindications, timing, and local policy
finding_text: CDC states oseltamivir is FDA-approved for chemoprophylaxis to prevent influenza
codeblue_translation: Route reviewable prophylaxis decisions after meaningful exposure; do not auto-order

finding_text: CDC says HCP returning to care for protective-environment patients such as HSCT may need temporary reassignment or exclusion
codeblue_translation: Route stricter staff-review logic for HSCT/protective-environment settings

operational_constraints: Requires organizational support and audit capacity
finding_text: CDC Core Practices require leadership support, training, patient/family education, surveillance, monitoring, and feedback
codeblue_translation: Use as the governance backbone beneath the influenza-specific interventions
